uplink.description: fPort 10 meter voltage: phase A 220V, B 198V, C 242V, 50Hz, backup batt 80%, phase B under / phase C over voltage events
uplink._note: Upstream example payload (codec yaml). Voltages V x10, freq = top 14 bits of bytes[7..9]. Maps power.voltage (phase A) + frequency; B/C kept as extras, backup battery percent -> batteryPercent.

uplink.description: fPort 50 channel 1 phase A: 178.9A, 34438.3W, PF 0.875, 5678.9 kWh, over-current event
uplink._note: Upstream example. current A x10, active power W x10 (22-bit signed), power factor x1000. active_energy upstream is kWh x10 (=5678.9 kWh); normalized to Wh via x1000.

uplink.description: fPort 55 channel 2 phase C: 620.5A, 117274.5W, PF 0.9, 2379645 kWh, no event
uplink._note: Upstream example. Empty phase event string. Energy 2379645 kWh -> 2379645000 Wh.

uplink.description: fPort 60 channel 4 phase B: 865.4A, negative active power -161829.8W (export/reverse), PF 0.85, 56789.2 kWh, over-current + heartbeat events
uplink._note: Upstream example exercising signed (negative) active power via 22-bit two's-complement. power.active has no minimum so the negative value is in bounds.

uplink.description: fPort 53 channel 2 phase A synthetic: 12.5A, 2750.0W, PF 0.99, 123.4 kWh, no event
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds phase reading on a different channel/phase fPort. current=125/10, power: 22-bit signed = 27500 -> 2750.0 W, PF=990/1000=0.99, energy 1234/10 kWh -> 123400 Wh. Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js.
Diagnostic version frame; no vocabulary key, firmwareVersion is an extra.

uplink.description: fPort 16 device settings: interval 15 min, UV 195, OV 245, OC 1000
uplink._note: Settings frame; all values are device-configuration extras.

uplink.description: fPort 10 meter frame with wrong leading type byte -> unknown packet type
uplink._note: Error vector: meter/phase frames require bytes[0]==0x0a.
Error vector for an fPort the device never emits.
